title: Errors when building CIRCT
body:
Hi, I encountered the following errors when build the CIRCT project. It seems that they are about using std::vaiant in Calyx. Could anyone help to check them at your convience?
The log file of ninja build is also enclosed. 
BTW, I have followed the set-up instructions in project mainpage to build it.

Thanks!

```bash
[172/370] Building CXX object lib/Conversion/SCFToCalyx/CMakeFiles/obj.CIRCTSCFToCalyx.dir/SCFToCalyx.cpp.o
```
